parameters.query:
SELECT id, webhook_secret
FROM caiac.clients
WHERE slug = '{{ $json.query.client_id }}'
LIMIT 1

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ timestamp: $('Receive Health Request').item.json.headers['x-caiac-timestamp'], signature: $('Receive Health Request').item.json.headers['x-caiac-signature'], signing_key: $('Receive Health Request').item.json.headers.authorization.replace('Bearer ', '').trim(), secret: $input.first().json.webhook_secret }) }}

parameters.query:
SELECT s.user_id, s.role, s.client_id, s.expires_at,
       u.name, u.email, u.active as user_active, u.is_caiac_staff,
       c.slug, c.active as client_active
FROM caiac.sessions s
JOIN caiac.users u ON s.user_id = u.id
JOIN caiac.clients c ON s.client_id = c.id
WHERE s.token = '{{ $('Check HMAC Valid').item.json.token }}'
AND s.expires_at > NOW()
AND u.active = true
AND c.active = true
LIMIT 1
